name: Team Agent Tactics
description: Auto-battler for 2 or 4 players. Draft units, build synergies, and fight! 1v1 or 2v2 with shared team HP.
rules:
OVERVIEW
Auto-battler for 2 or 4 players. In 2-player mode it is 1v1. In 4-player mode teams share HP and fight fixed lanes. Reduce enemy team HP to 0 or lead after round 10.

SHOP PHASE
Players act simultaneously: buy shop units, sell bench units, reroll, move units between bench and 4x2 board, gift unit/gold to a teammate in 2v2, then ready. Board cells 0-3 are front row, 4-7 back row. Max 5 units on board and 4 on bench.

BATTLE PHASE
No player actions. Each lane resolves automatically. Losing team takes base round damage plus survivor tier/star damage.

TRAITS
2+ matching traits activate: warrior +ATK, guardian armor, assassin leap, mage splash, healer healing, ranger +ATK. Three matching non-star copies merge into a star unit.
